name: Eggplant Monte Cristo
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplants crosswise into 1/2 inch slices.
2. Sprinkle with salt and drain in a colander for 20 minutes.
3. Pat dry with a paper towel.
4. Combine flour, eggs, oil, and enough warm water to make a thick batter.
5. Combine cheese, capers, and garlic powder.
6. Heat oil.
7. Make a sandwich with a thin layer of cheese mixture between two slices of eggplant.
8. Press together and spread with a fork.
9. Dip into batter.
10. Cook 3-4 minutes in very hot oil.
11. Place on paper towels to drain.
12. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
13. Cut in half and garnish with olives.
14. Serve hot.
